title: Grilled Kenyan Skewers with Delicate Onions
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make dish featuring Kenyan beef or lamb skewers, paired with sweet and caramelized delicate onions.
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat (400°F or 200°C).
In a large bowl, whisk together 2 tbsp olive oil, 1 tsp salt, 1 tsp black pepper, and 1 tsp your favorite Kenyan spice blend.
Add the Kenyan lamb or beef cubes and marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Thread the marinated meat and onions onto the skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the meat is cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Meanwhile, grill the thinly sliced delicate onions for 2-3 minutes per side, until caramelized and slightly charred.
Serve the skewers with the grilled delicate onions and enjoy!
